title: Surgeon Vacancy at Apollo Hospitals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Apollo Hospitals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals:
Apollo Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals!
